Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}To make a long story short, I'd like you to join student council.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}We meet regularly, but I don't expect you to participate every time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Just come to the student council room when you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Yes, that's it. All I want is for you to be a member.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Being president is very time-consuming. I'd like to have an ally to support me in the event of an emergency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}An ally meaning someone who understands my situation. You know what it means to be a leader, so I'm asking you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Being president is very time-consuming. I'd like to have an ally to support me in the event of an emergency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}An ally meaning someone who understands my situation. You know what it means to be a leader, so I'm asking you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Excellent, I knew I could count on you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...And I've already filed and approved your student council membership on your behalf.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But you'll have to go to the faculty office on your own to sign everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like in order to join the student[n]council, {f 0 1 2}I have to go find Ms. Toriumi{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to tell her that I'm[n]going to {f 0 1 2}join student council{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I'm sorry for making arrangements without your permission, but I hope you understand the position I'm in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Once you're ready, come to the student council room. I'll be waiting for you there, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}
